channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Nussmeier throws late TD passes, No. 13 LSU rallies to beat No. 9 Ole Miss 29-26 in overtime
item.description: BATON ROUGE, La. (AP) — Garrett Nussmeier was in the midst of what the LSU quarterback considered one of the worst games of his career. His last two snaps changed everything.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pochettino wins US debut as Musah and Pepi score second-half goals in 2-0 victory over Panama
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Mauricio Pochettino arrived at Q2 Stadium to see posters and banners with his face around the grandstand and behind a goal. By the time he left, he was saluting fans who were cheering his name. The 52-year-old Argentine's debut as U.S. coach was a crowd-pleasing success.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dillon Gabriel rallies No. 3 Oregon past No. 2 Ohio State, 32-31
item.description: EUGENE, Ore. (AP) — Dillon Gabriel threw two touchdown passes and ran for another late score to help third-ranked Oregon hand No. 2 Ohio State its first loss of the season, 32-31 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ewers returns as No. 1 Texas beats No. 18 Oklahoma 34-3 in 1st Red River Rivalry game as SEC members
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Quinn Ewers came back again for No. 1 Texas with another romp over Red River rival Oklahoma, this time in the Southeastern Conference.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: German soccer player punished for not signing gay pride shirt: 'I'm not signing that'
item.description: German professional soccer club VfL Wolfsburg disciplined striker Kevin Behrens after he didn't sign a gay pride shirt and allegedly said something offensive.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Middle school cheerleaders burned after coach's 'punishment'
item.description: The eighth graders said they were punished for performing a cheer at a football game their coach didn't want them to do.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Washburn, NewsNation

item.title: Jets holdout sued for $1.6 million; allegedly failed to pay business partner, sent 'security' to scare him off
item.description: As he continues his bizarre holdout that has cost him nearly $9 million, Haason Reddick is being sued for $1.6 million after allegedly stiffing, and trying to scare off, a business partner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: NFL wife Devon Mostert receives racist hate online for defending DeSantis against Harris
item.description: Devon Mostert praised Ron DeSantis' response to Hurricane Helene and Hurricane Milton making landfall in Florida back-to-back. Mostert received racist backlash from social media users.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patriots’ Robert Kraft says Jabrill Peppers is ‘gone’ if disturbing domestic violence allegations are true
item.description: New England Patriots owner Robert Kraft said this week that if the allegations against safety Jabrill Peppers are true, "he's gone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Portland Trail Blazers' Israeli native misses game for Yom Kippur: 'More important things than basketball'
item.description: Portland Trail Blazers forward Deni Avdija missed the team's preseason game on Friday night to observe Yom Kippur just after the one-year anniversary of Oct. 7.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Padres eliminated from playoffs after loss to Dodgers in Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: The Padres playoff road has come to an end after losing to the Los Angeles Dodgers 2-0 in Game 5 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Padres vs. Dodgers Game 5: Who will advance to the NLCS?
item.description: PHOTOS: The San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers will face off in Game 5 of the National League Division Series (NLDS) on Friday, Oct. 11 at Dodger Stadium. The winner of this game will advance to the NLCS, which starts on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC wins overtime thriller over Islanders, 5-4
item.description: LONG ISLAND, N.Y. (ABC4 Sports) - In its first ever road game, the Utah Hockey Club proved to be extremely resilient. Dylan Guenther scored his second goal at 2:18 of overtime, and the Utah Hockey Club rallied for a 5-4 win against the New York Islanders at UBS Arena on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: PGA Golfers impressed with Black Desert Resort
item.description: IVINS, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The PGA Tour returns to Utah for the first time since 1963 when the Black Desert Championship tees off Thursday in Ivins, Utah. Most of the 132 golfers in the tournament have never played in Utah before, and they have been impressed with the course at Black Desert Resort.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mets take 2-1 series lead over rival Phillies
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Utah HC beats Chicago in historic opener, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was an historic day with a memorable ending. The Utah Hockey Club never trailed after getting first-period goals from Dylan Guenther and Clayton Keller and held off a late rally to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-2 in the season opener for both teams on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego Padres urge fans to 'stay classy'
item.description: San Diego Padres management is asking fans to demonstrate good behavior as the contentious National League Division Series shifts from Dodger Stadium to Petco Park on Tuesday, tied at one game apiece.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Raccoon sparks chaos in stands during Broncos game against Raiders
item.description: Football fans packed Empower Field in Denver on Sunday to watch the Broncos take on the Las Vegas Raiders, but they weren’t the only ones in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, Fox 5

item.title: Taylor Swift is back to watch Travis Kelce and the Chiefs with Eras Tour soon to resume
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Taylor Swift was back at Arrowhead Stadium on Monday night to see her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the Kansas City Chiefs play the New Orleans Saints after the pop superstar had missed the team's previous two games on the road.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Karl-Anthony Towns scores 10 points in abbreviated preseason debut with New York Knicks
item.description: Jalen Brunson thought twice about going 1-on-2 in transition, instead dribbled back outside and flipped the ball behind him to Karl-Anthony Towns, who made a 3-pointer with a defender in his face.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake clinches home playoff game with 1-0 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake will be home for the playoffs, at least in the first round. RSL (15-7-11) extended its five-game unbeaten run with a 1-0 win away at San Jose, as Zac MacMath recorded his second straight clean sheet in goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
